mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (user_id, user_pw, nick, phone, email, gender, birthdate, skin_type) VALUES ( #{user_id}, SHA2(#{user_pw}, 256), #{nick}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{birthdate}, #{skin_type} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, nick, phone, email, gender, birthdate, skin_type, joined_at FROM t_user WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND user_pw = SHA2(#{user_pw}, 256)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET nick = #{nick}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, gender = #{gender}, birthdate = #{birthdate} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
UPDATE t_user SET user_pw = SHA2(#{user_pw}, 256) WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND user_pw = SHA2(#{cur_pw}, 256)
